abilities.name: Freikorps Suit
abilities.description: Ignores all damage from pulse and blast effects.

abilities.name: From the Shadows
abilities.description: If no enemy aware of this character, may immediately take one additional turn after Initiative flip before characters resolve turns.

abilities.name: Unimpeded
abilities.description: Ignores terrain penalties when taking Movement Actions.

actions: (1) Hunting Knife (Labor) | AV: 5 (11) | Rg: y1 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 1/3/4 damage.

(1) Clockwork Rifle (Long Arms) | AV: 5 (11) | Rg: z12 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 2/3/5 damage. Gains + to attack flip. Range +10 per + from Focused. Capacity 1, Reload 2. Ram Critical Strike: +1 per Ram.
(0) Freikorps Tactics | Discard card to add suit of choice to every duel until start of next turn.
system.notes: Scout-snipers selected for tracking and hunting expertise. Earn additional revenue through pelts and furs.
